Q19_text: I make decisions firmly and without hesitation
Q20_text: When I decide to do something. I am able to make an effort easily
Q22_text: I get things done when they need to be done. without requiring reminders from others
Q23_text: When I decide to do something. I am motivated to see it through to the end
Q24_text: When I have something I need to do. I do it straightaway so it is out of the way
